subject: An anime figure with pink hair and an ornate large hat or magical headdress, intense forward gaze, in a bright pink and white color palette
description: A small framed card at medium resolution. The central figure is an anime character with pink hair and large, expressive eyes directed forward with a serious, focused expression. They wear a large ornate hat or decorative magical headpiece that dominates their silhouette — pink and white tones throughout. The background has indistinct bright elements consistent with a magical or action setting. The card name confirms the figure as Iroha from the Magia Record franchise. The palette is pink, white, and light tones.
foreground: Anime figure with pink hair and large ornate hat, serious expression
emotion: determined and serious — a focused forward stare with resolve
